mapper.sql: e.id, e.plan_id, e.stu_id, e.enroll_time, e.audit_status, e.audit_user, e.audit_time, e.audit_remark, e.create_time, e.update_time, p.plan_name as plan_name, s.student_name as student_name, s.student_no as student_no
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_enroll e LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON e.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON e.stu_id = s.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_enroll (plan_id, stu_id, enroll_time, audit_status, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{stuId}, #{enrollTime}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditUser}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_enroll WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_enroll e LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON e.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON e.stu_id = s.id WHERE e.plan_id = #{planId} AND e.stu_id = #{stuId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM train_enroll e LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON e.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON e.stu_id = s.id WHERE e.plan_id = #{planId} AND e.stu_id = #{stuId} LIMIT 1
